ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meals" (
  "meal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal */,
  "meal_name" TEXT /* Name of the meal */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the meal */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the meal belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meal */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the meal's image */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calories in the meal */,
  "fat" REAL /* Fat content in the meal */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Carbohydrates content in the meal */,
  "protein" REAL /* Protein content in the meal */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the meal is available */,
  "availability_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of meal availability */,
  "availability_end_date" TEXT /* End date of meal availability */,
  "preparation_time" TEXT /* Time required to prepare the meal */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Dynamic popularity score based on orders and ratings */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the meal */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings for the meal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meals_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the center */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the center */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the center */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of customers the center can serve */,
  "center_type" TEXT /* Type of the center (e.g., kitchen, restaurant, cafe) */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* List of available facilities (e.g., Wi-Fi, parking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_centers_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "meal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meal */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the center */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number for the price */,
  "checkout_price" REAL /* Checkout price of the meal */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the meal */,
  "price_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the price was last changed */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the base price */,
  "price_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_prices_meal_id FOREIGN KEY ("meal_id") REFERENCES meals ("meal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_prices_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_prices_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "meal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meal */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the center */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number for the promotion */,
  "emailer_for_promotion" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the meal was part of an email promotion */,
  "homepage_featured" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the meal was featured on the homepage */,
  "promotion_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, free item) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount if applicable */,
  "free_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the free item if applicable */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_meal_id FOREIGN KEY ("meal_id") REFERENCES meals ("meal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "meal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meal */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the center */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number for the order */,
  "num_orders" INTEGER /* Number of orders for the meal */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, confirmed, delivered) */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_meal_id FOREIGN KEY ("meal_id") REFERENCES meals ("meal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the center the manager is responsible for */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Manager's salary */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Manager's performance rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, marketing) */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the center the user is associated with */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., meal, center, order) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the accessed resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
